heading: President of bank as member of board; chairman of board
label: 76 President of bank as member of board; chairman of board
text: The president of the bank shall be a member of the board and shall be the chairman thereof, but the board may designate a director in lieu of the president to be chairman of the board, who shall perform such duties as may be designated by the board.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5150 derived from , , which was the National Bank Act. See .act June 3, 1864, ch. 106, § 913 Stat. 102section 38 of this title
Amendments1927—Act , amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “One of the directors, to be chosen by the board, shall be president of the board.”Feb. 25, 1927
